name: Brownie Cheesecake Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together flour, sugar, melted butter, cocoa, 2 eggs, milk, and 2 teaspoons vanilla extract until well blended.
4. Stir in chopped nuts if using.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan.
6. In a small mixing bowl, beat cream cheese with 2 tablespoons butter and cornstarch until fluffy.
7. Gradually add sweetened condensed milk and then the remaining 1 egg and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract, beating until smooth.
8. Spread the cream cheese mixture over the brownie batter.
9. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until the top is lightly browned.
10. Allow to cool, then refrigerate.
11. Cut into bars and store covered in the refrigerator.
